name: consensus-vote-protocol-v1
description: Multi-model consensus gate: fans a claim out to three agents using different LLM backends, then routes through arbiter for weighted Bayesian decision. No report is published without quorum.

steps.name: provenance-init
steps.prompt_template: Create a new Claim provenance node for: claim_id={{input.claim_id}}, claim_text={{input.claim_text}}, platform={{input.platform}}, priority={{input.priority}}. Archive all source URLs. Return claim_id and provenance node confirmation.

steps.name: vote-deep-reasoning
steps.prompt_template: CONSENSUS VOTE — DEEP REASONING BACKEND. Evaluate claim: {{input.claim_text}}. Ontology context: {{input.ontology_context}}. Return structured verdict JSON with fields: agent, model, verdict, confidence, reasoning_chain. thinking_budget=10000.

steps.name: vote-large-model
steps.prompt_template: CONSENSUS VOTE — LARGE MODEL BACKEND. Independently evaluate claim WITHOUT seeing the deep reasoning vote: {{input.claim_text}}. Ontology context: {{input.ontology_context}}. Return structured verdict JSON with fields: agent, model, verdict, confidence, reasoning_chain.

steps.name: vote-retrieval-grounded
steps.prompt_template: CONSENSUS VOTE — RETRIEVAL-GROUNDED BACKEND. Evaluate claim using current source retrieval only (no prior reasoning): {{input.claim_text}}. Source registry context: lookup sources for each URL in {{input.source_urls}}. Return structured verdict JSON: agent, model, verdict, confidence, reasoning_chain.

steps.name: visual-vote
steps.prompt_template: CONSENSUS VOTE — VISUAL EVIDENCE BACKEND. Analyse all images/videos associated with claim {{input.claim_id}}: {{input.media_urls}}. Apply caption consistency, manipulation detection, and EXIF validation checks via image-forensics skill. Return visual evidence JSON and verdict contribution.

steps.name: arbiter-consensus
steps.prompt_template: Apply Consensus Protocol to the following votes. Deep reasoning vote: {{vote_deep}}. Large model vote: {{vote_large}}. Retrieval vote: {{vote_retrieval}}. Visual vote: {{vote_visual}}. Provenance node: {{provenance_node}}. Apply weighted Bayesian merge, safety rules, and output final arbiter decision JSON.

steps.name: provenance-consensus-attach
steps.prompt_template: Attach ConsensusVote node to provenance graph for claim {{input.claim_id}}. Data: {{arbiter_decision}}. Attach all CrossCheck nodes from individual votes. Mark provenance chain complete.

steps.name: route-decision
steps.prompt_template: Route arbiter decision: {{arbiter_decision}}. If decision=auto-publish: trigger coordinated-debunk-engine-v2. If decision=monitor: log to watchlist. If decision=escalate-human: create human-review task. If decision=false-debunk: trigger accountability workflow. Provenance: {{provenance_complete}}.
